notes: RP-000–RP-027 are excluded bootstrap diagnostics. Run-001 is the first real research and prose baseline. Twenty-three packets are accepted and sufficient. R2 corrected the central belief-change engine, outcome tiers, persona duplication, analogies, and science structure; the bird audit accepted it. The full-packet reviewer found only one added period in an exact quote and one persona-ID mismatch, so a complete model-owned R3 correction is commissioned from the same evidence. No new retrieval or architecture. Muse Spark 1.1 is deferred until after this Opus baseline and does not block it.
